steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; if (!preview || typeof preview.patchBuilderState !== 'function') { throw new Error('Preview patchBuilderState API not available.'); } const nextState = preview.patchBuilderState({ selectedDimensions: ['country'], selectedMeasures: ['avails'], primaryMeasure: 'avails', viewMode: 'table', chartSpec: null, orderField: 'country', orderDir: 'desc' }); if (!nextState || !Array.isArray(nextState.selectedDimensions) || nextState.selectedDimensions[0] !== 'country') { throw new Error('Failed to pivot builder state to country dimension.'); } return true; })()

steps.text: Market Geo added to the report document.

steps.expression: (() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; if (!preview || typeof preview.replaceCollectionRows !== 'function') { throw new Error('Preview replaceCollectionRows API not available.'); } preview.replaceCollectionRows([{ country: 'CA', avails: 1200000 }, { country: 'WA', avails: 980000 }], { hasMore: false, error: null }); return true; })()

(() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview'); const text = root?.innerText || root?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Market Geo') && text.includes('2 Regions') && text.includes('CA') && text.includes('WA'); })()

steps.text: Saved exploration artifact: Report Builder Demo
Saved report payload: Report Builder Demo

steps.expression: (() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Prepare get response')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Prepare get response button not found.'); } button.click(); })()

steps.text: Get ReportDocument response: Report Builder Demo

steps.expression: (() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Reopen in builder')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Reopen in builder button not found.'); } button.click(); })()

steps.text: Reopened ReportDocument Report Builder Demo for editing.

steps.expression: (() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview'); const text = root?.innerText || root?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Market Geo') && text.includes('2 Regions') && text.includes('CA') && text.includes('WA'); })()
